title: 主神的游戏
description:
An unseen godlike being has dragged you into a brutal multiverseAn unseen godlike being has dragged you into a brutal multiverse. Every struggle, every battle, and every desperate escape is nothing more than entertainment in its eyes. Here, death is not the end, and survival is only your ticket to the next trial. Travel across nine worlds with completely different rules, learn how each realm works, push beyond your limits, break free from fate, and perhaps even defy the will of the being watching from above. Every choice is yours to make.

Nine Worlds, Nine Sets of RulesFrom eerie supernatural realms to ruined post-apocalyptic wastelands, from zombie-infested cities to strange fantasy worlds, each of the nine realms features its own story, questlines, enemy mechanics, and special rules. Every world offers a different pace, a different combat experience, and a different way to clear the game.

High-Freedom Skill Chips and Bloodline Evolution — Build Your Own Broken Power Complete trials issued by the godlike being, earn rewards from different realms, and unlock a wide range of skill chips, special abilities, and bloodline upgrades. Over 40 hot-swappable chips can completely transform how your skills work. Insert chips into any skill to instantly alter its form, changing its trajectory, behavior, or projectile properties. Mix and match 68 bloodline powers to create unexpected synergies. Stack the same bloodline to trigger its pure-blood final evolution, or combine different bloodlines to unlock unpredictable mutations.

Every Rebirth Is a New Way to SurviveWith every rebirth, the order of the worlds changes. Each time you enter a world, you may encounter different side quests, bloodline drops, and events. Changes in world order can also affect branching storylines and how each realm develops. Every jump between worlds is more than a simple map change. It is a new set of rules, new choices, and a new fate to survive.
description_short: A Roguelike multiverse adventure ruled by an unseen godlike being. Your life and death are part of its game. Travel across nine wildly different worlds, gain powerful skills and bloodline upgrades, and evolve through each cycle of death and rebirth.
